tools.name: things.describeJobExecution
tools.description: Gets details of a job execution.

tools.name: things.getPendingJobExecutions
tools.description: Gets the list of all jobs for a thing that are not in a terminal status.

tools.name: things.startNextPendingJobExecution
tools.description: Gets and starts the next pending (status IN_PROGRESS or QUEUED) job execution for a thing.

tools.name: things.updateJobExecution
tools.description: Updates the status of a job execution.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
